nasb.text: “Speak to Aaron and to his sons and to all the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘This is what the Lord has commanded, saying,

esv.text: “Speak to Aaron and his sons and to all the people of Israel and say to them, This is the thing that the Lord has commanded.

cnv.text: “你要告訴亞倫和他的兒子，以及以色列人，對他們說：這是耶和華的吩咐：

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉亚伦父子们及全体以色列人。
